rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to February 11, 2014 for the filing of a verification to the supplement signed by petitioner. As noted in the examiner's notes, the supplement was to be signed and verified by the petitioner. The exception allowing attorneys to sign for clients does not apply when the petitioner is seeking to be appointed as a fiduciary. Deadline for filing the verification to avoid a further continuance is Thursday, February 6, 2014. Please note, a courtesy copy must be delivered to this Examiner in Room 202. Emailing or faxing documents to the court is not allowed.
